description_long: This object is a rectangular counter device with a metallic and industrial appearance, featuring eight prominent glass tubes on its top surface, each displaying glowing orange numerals reminiscent of Nixie tubes. The main body is constructed from a dark, brushed metal with visible bolts and a slightly weathered finish, suggesting durability and a utilitarian design. The top panel is brass-toned with a series of small, round metallic controls or connectors, and the tubes are evenly spaced in a single row. The numerals inside the tubes are clearly visible and illuminated, giving the device a retro-futuristic aesthetic. The sides of the object are plain, with the ends showing the cylindrical bases of the tubes and some additional metallic detailing. This counter would likely be found in an urban environment such as a workshop, laboratory, or industrial control room, serving as a display or measurement device.
description: A rectangular metal counter with eight glowing Nixie-style tubes displaying orange numerals, set on a brass-toned top with metallic controls. The body is dark, industrial, and robust, with a retro-futuristic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all eight illuminated Nixie tubes with visible numerals and the brass-toned top panel with controls.
description_view_1: Side view showing the cylindrical bases of the tubes and the narrow profile of the counter.
description_view_2: Rear view with the backs of the Nixie tubes and the metallic body, less detail on the numerals.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tube bases and metallic side panel.
attribute_button_layout: multiple small round buttons and rotary knobs in a horizontal row
